data.content: 1. [src/lib/memory-manager-commands.ts:60] rollbackBeatState invokes 'kno rollback <id>' instead of the knot-specified 'kno rb <id>'. 2. [src/lib/__tests__/memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts:82] The regression test suite codifies the same wrong command, so current test coverage would preserve the spec drift rather than catch it. 3. Sanity check: 'bun run vitest src/lib/__tests__/memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts' passed on 2026-03-10, confirming the implementation is internally consistent but still fails the knot requirement.
